ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in centimeters */,
  "activity_level" TEXT /* Activity level of the user (e.g., sedentary, active, very active) */,
  "goal_steps" INTEGER /* Daily goal for steps */,
  "goal_calories" INTEGER /* Daily goal for calories burned */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Social media links of the user */,
  "friends" TEXT /* Friends of the user on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was performed */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., walking, running, cycling) */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group to which the activity belongs (e.g., walking, running) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the activity in seconds */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the activity in kilometers */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps taken during the activity */,
  "calories_burned" INTEGER /* Number of calories burned during the activity */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Device used to track the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the activity */,
  "activity_tags" TEXT /* Tags related to the activity */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_group FOREIGN KEY ("group") REFERENCES activity_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_activity_type FOREIGN KEY ("activity_type") REFERENCES activity_types ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_types" (
  "activity_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity type */,
  "activity_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity type (e.g., walking, running, cycling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity type */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the activity type */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the activity type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity group (e.g., walking, running) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the activity group */,
  "icon" TEXT /* Icon representing the activity group */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the activity group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_goals" (
  "goal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each goal */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the goal */,
  "goal_type" TEXT /* Type of goal (e.g., steps, calories) */,
  "goal_value" INTEGER /* Value of the goal (e.g., 10000 steps, 2000 calories) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the goal */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the goal */,
  "is_achieved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the goal has been achieved */,
  "goal_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the goal */,
  "goal_tags" TEXT /* Tags related to the goal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_goals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., smartwatch, fitness tracker) */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device (e.g., Apple Watch, Fitbit) */,
  "device_os" TEXT /* Operating system of the device */,
  "device_model" TEXT /* Model of the device */,
  "device_firmware" TEXT /* Firmware version of the device */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last sync with the platform */,
  "device_token" TEXT /* Device token for push notifications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_devices_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., goal reminder, activity update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workouts" (
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workout */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the workout */,
  "workout_name" TEXT /* Name of the workout */,
  "workout_description" TEXT /* Description of the workout */,
  "workout_date" TEXT /* Date when the workout was performed */,
  "workout_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the workout in seconds */,
  "workout_distance" REAL /* Distance covered during the workout in kilometers */,
  "workout_calories_burned" INTEGER /* Number of calories burned during the workout */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workouts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workout_exercises" (
  "workout_exercise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exercise */,
  "workout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the workout that includes the exercise */,
  "exercise_name" TEXT /* Name of the exercise */,
  "exercise_description" TEXT /* Description of the exercise */,
  "exercise_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the exercise in seconds */,
  "exercise_weight" REAL /* Weight used during the exercise in kilograms */,
  "exercise_reps" INTEGER /* Number of repetitions performed during the exercise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workout_exercise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_workout_exercises_workout_id FOREIGN KEY ("workout_id") REFERENCES workouts ("workout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_sharing" (
  "social_sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media share */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the activity */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity that was shared */,
  "social_media_platform" TEXT /* Social media platform used for sharing (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_sharing_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard entry */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge that the leaderboard belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is ranked in the leaderboard */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the user in the leaderboard */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the user in the leaderboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "challenges" (
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each challenge */,
  "challenge_name" TEXT /* Name of the challenge */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the challenge */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the challenge */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the challenge */,
  "participation_fee" REAL /* Participation fee for the challenge */,
  "prize" TEXT /* Prize for winning the challenge */,
  "challenge_image" TEXT /* Image representing the challenge */,
  "challenge_rules" TEXT /* Rules of the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("challenge_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_challenges" (
  "user_challenge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user's participation in a challenge */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the challenge */,
  "challenge_id" INTEGER /* ID of the challenge */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's participation (e.g., joined, in progress, completed) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the challenge */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the user completed the challenge */,
  "challenge_progress" INTEGER /* Progress of the user in the challenge */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_challenges_challenge_id FOREIGN KEY ("challenge_id") REFERENCES challenges ("challenge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_challenges_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
